      <activity role='admitting staff' action='admit suspected hip fracture patient' objects='admission order, presenting complaint' id='activity5'/>

      <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway2a'>
        <branch id='branch36a'>
          <activity role='admitting physician' action='perform initial inpatient medical assessment' objects='history/exam, assess stability, initial documentation' id='activity50-1'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch37a'>
          <activity role='orthopedic surgeon' action='provide consultation' objects='orthopedic assessment and initial operative plan input' id='activity50-2'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch38a'>
          <activity role='ward staff' action='notify care team' objects='make anesthesiologist and internist/geriatrician aware as needed' id='activity50-3'/>
          <inclusiveGateway id='inclusivegateway1a'>
            <branch condition='anesthesiology consultation needed' id='branch39a'>
              <activity role='anesthesiologist' action='provide consultation' objects='perioperative risk input as needed' id='activity50-4'/>
            </branch>
            <branch condition='internal medicine/geriatric consultation needed' id='branch40a'>
              <activity role='internist/geriatrician' action='provide consultation' objects='medical optimization input as needed' id='activity50-5'/>
            </branch>
            <branch condition='no anesthesiology consultation needed and no internal medicine/geriatric consultation needed' id='branch41a'>
              <activity role='ward staff' action='document no additional consult required' objects='consult decision recorded' id='activity50-6'/>
            </branch>
          </inclusiveGateway>
        </branch>
      </parallelGateway>

      <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway3a'>
        <branch id='branch42a'>
          <activity role='ward nurse' action='assess and document fall context and injuries' objects='reason for the fall, other collateral injuries' id='activity51-1'/>
          <activity role='ward nurse' action='assess and document temperature and pain' objects='temperature, pain' id='activity51-2'/>
          <activity role='ward nurse' action='assess and document continence' objects='continence' id='activity51-3'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch43a'>
          <activity role='ward nurse' action='assess and document fluid/nutrition status and skin risk' objects='fluid balance, hydration and nutrition, pressure sore risk' id='activity51-4'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch44a'>
          <activity role='admitting physician/pharmacist' action='assess and document comorbidities and drug therapy' objects='comorbid conditions; current drug therapy including any anticoagulants' id='activity51-5'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch45a'>
          <activity role='ward clinician/social worker' action='assess and document baseline function, cognition and social circumstances' objects='pre-fracture functional ability and mobility; physical and functional level; MMSE/MOCA/CAM as appropriate; caregiver/community supports/family involvement' id='activity51-6'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch46a'>
          <activity role='admitting physician' action='order diagnostics' objects='appropriate blood work and hip/pelvis X-rays per protocol' id='activity51-7'/>
        </branch>
      </parallelGateway>

      <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway4a'>
        <branch id='branch47a'>
          <activity role='ward nurse/pharmacist' action='complete medication reconciliation' objects='standardized medication reconciliation form' id='activity52-1'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch48a'>
          <activity role='ward staff' action='initiate immediate management' objects='hydration plan, analgesia and reassessment, delirium prevention steps, pressure sore prevention steps' id='activity52-2'/>
        </branch>
      </parallelGateway>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>

  <exclusiveGateway id='exclusivegateway2'>
    <branch condition='presenting hospital is a surgical hospital' id='branch21'>
      <activity role='admitting team' action='initiate hip fracture inpatient order set' objects='inpatient care plan initiation' id='activity29-1'/>
      <activity role='admitting team' action='set day-of-stay goals and document pathway trajectory' objects='pathway trajectory aligned to day-of-stay goals' id='activity29-2'/>
    </branch>
    <branch condition='presenting hospital is a non-surgical hospital' id='branch22'>
      <activity role='non-surgical hospital clinical team' action='assess stability for transfer readiness' objects='vitals/ABC stability, pain control, immediate risks' id='activity30-1'/>
      <inclusiveGateway id='inclusivegateway2'>
        <branch condition='physiologic instability requires optimization' id='branch22-1'>
          <activity role='non-surgical hospital clinical team' action='resuscitate/optimize physiology' objects='stabilization while awaiting expeditious transfer' id='activity30-2'/>
        </branch>
        <branch condition='patient on anticoagulant or coagulopathy suspected' id='branch22-2'>
          <activity role='non-surgical hospital physician' action='initiate anticoagulant reversal plan' objects='reversal/holding plan and monitoring to support safe surgery' id='activity30-3'/>
        </branch>
      </inclusiveGateway>

      <parallelGateway id='parallelgateway5'>
        <branch id='branch22-3'>
          <activity role='non-surgical hospital coordinator' action='contact receiving surgical hospital and confirm acceptance' objects='timely transfer protocol activation' id='activity31-1'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch22-4'>
          <activity role='non-surgical hospital coordinator' action='arrange transport/escort level' objects='transport booking and required monitoring level' id='activity31-2'/>
        </branch>
        <branch id='branch22-5'>
          <activity role='non-surgical hospital coordinator' action='send transfer documentation and handover summary' objects='clinical summary, meds, imaging/labs, consent status' id='activity31-3'/>
        </branch>
      </parallelGateway>

      <activity role='transport/receiving surgical hospital' action='transfer patient to surgical hospital for operation' objects='transfer documentation and handover' id='activity32'/>

      <activity role='surgical hospital surgical team' action='complete pre-op readiness check' objects='anesthesia/medical clearance and optimization to meet 48-hour target' id='activity33-1'/>
      <activity role='surgical hospital surgical team' action='perform operative repair' objects='surgery within 48 hours of initial presentation (including non-surgical hospital starts)' id='activity33-2'/>

      <activity role='surgical hospital and local hospital teams' action='repatriate patient to local hospital when appropriate' objects='repatriation per protocol' id='activity34'/>
    </branch>
  </exclusiveGateway>
</process>)</API>
